object-types.name: LockstepPlayerInput
object-types.description: Represents an action taken by a player in a lockstep game. An instance is stored only if the player has taken an action.

object-types.name: LockstepDebugStateReport
object-types.description: Contains the state reports that are normally sent to the server

object-types.name: LockstepGameMetadata
object-types.description: Contains important information about the game. Only one instance must exist.

members.name: git_short_commit_hash
members.description: Git short commit hash of the player that has saved this level

members.name: self_index
members.description: Index of the player that has saved this level

members.name: duration_tc
members.description: The duration of the level in timecodes
